required_statement: Raw expression was not pooled across datasets, species or tissues.
No broad pregnancy-wide FDR support was detected.
Tissue samples are inferential units; no dam-level inference is made.
Cellular localization is descriptive at n=2 control versus n=2 UPEC.
The minimum attainable exact two-sided permutation p-value is 0.333.
Metabolic modules represent transcriptionally inferred pathway activity, not metabolite flux.
Complement recurrence remains provisional where independent sample support is limited.
Evidence-weighted networks summarize directional association and do not establish direct causal sequences.
